channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: AirDoctor Coupon Codes: 40% Off | April 2026
item.description: Save up to $400 on top air purifiers and filters with verified AirDoctor promo codes and special offers for April 2026.

item.title: Hoka Coupon Codes: 10% Off | April 2026
item.description: Unlock free expedited shipping or 10% off with today’s Hoka discount codes, plus save up to 30% with the best discounts for April 2026.

item.title: Bose Promo Code: 40% Off Bose for April 2026
item.description: Get at least 40% off headphones, speakers, soundbars, and other audio products from Bose.

item.title: $50 Target Promo Code & Coupons | April 2026
item.description: Get $50 off your next order or up to 50% off site wide with Target coupon codes and Circle deals.

item.title: 60% Off Groupon Promo Code | April 2026
item.description: Unlock up to 60% off, 40% off packages, and 20% off with top Groupon coupon codes. Explore coupons to save extra on travel getaways, holiday gifts, spa days, and event tickets.

item.title: 15% Off Adidas Promo Code | April 2026
item.description: Save 15% or 30% with Adidas promo codes, plus explore March deals for 40% off trendy sneakers.

item.title: 30% VistaPrint Coupon & Promo Codes | April 2026
item.description: From personalized gifts to business essentials, WIRED can help you save with our selection of VistaPrint promo codes.

item.title: $100 Off Shark Promo Code | This April
item.description: Shark makes some seriously powerful vacuums, from handheld vacs to steam mops. Don’t miss $100 off, 10% off, and more limited-time coupons from WIRED.

item.title: AI design platform Picsart launches a creator monetization program
item.description: The program invites creators to create original content with Picsart tools for a specific campaign, share it on their social channels, and earn revenue based on how their audience engages.
